Raster to DXF

Centerline vectorization for black-and-white line drawings

Upload a generated line drawing, reduce each visible stroke to a single center axis, add a white-filled enclosed region where the drawing encloses an object body, preview the result, and download a spline-based DXF.

API docs

Waiting for an image.

Preview

Upload a line drawing to render the centerline preview.

Vector stats

Paths
-
Canvas
-

The service treats black raster lines as strokes, thins them to a centerline, uses an internal mixed geometry export, and adds a white hatch fill for enclosed outline regions.
